title: CLI Argument Contract Sweep
description: Scan CLI command parser/help/i18n/snapshots vs implementation, especially named vs positional args, hidden defaults, flag contradictions, command docs, and generated help copy. Find only new issues beyond registry.
findings: 已读 registry 并排除 ISS-20260609-021..042、ISS-20260531-114、ISS-20260608-031/034 等同类旧项；扫描 packages/cli 命令定义、shared i18n、README/docs 和 CLI surface snapshots。新增 2 个 distinct CLI 参数契约问题：install global 分支绕过 dry-run；sync continue/abort 互斥缺失。
issues_found: [{"title":"fabric install --global ignores the declared --dry-run no-write contract","severity":"medium","description":"install-v2 declares --dry-run as printing the install plan without writing files, but runInitCommand checks args.global first and immediately calls runGlobalInstall({url}) without passing or honoring dry-run. runGlobalInstall then runs installGlobalCore, writes global ~/.fabric state, and mounts/clones a URL when provided. A user running fabric install --global --dry-run or --global --url ... --dry-run gets real global writes despite the shared dry-run flag contract.","location":"packages/cli/src/commands/install-v2.ts:38; packages/cli/src/commands/install-v2.ts:87; packages/cli/src/install/run-global-install.ts:117; packages/cli/src/install/run-global-install.ts:135","fix_direction":"Either reject --dry-run combined with --global as an explicit invalid combination, or extend runGlobalInstall with a planOnly/dryRun mode that reports global config/store clone/mount actions without writing. Add a CLI-level regression for fabric install --global --dry-run asserting no ~/.fabric writes and no git clone.","affected_components":["fabric install","install-v2","global install","dry-run contract"],"tags":["cli-arg-contracts","dry-run","flag-contradiction","no-write-contract"]},{"title":"fabric sync accepts --continue and --abort together and silently prioritizes continue","severity":"medium","description":"sync exposes two mutually exclusive resume actions, --continue and --abort, but the command handler only checks args.continue first and returns before inspecting args.abort. If both flags are supplied, the abort request is ignored and runContinueSync executes. This contradicts the documented conflict-resolution model where continue and abort are alternatives, and can run the more state-advancing path when the user also requested abort.","location":"packages/cli/src/commands/sync.ts:29; packages/cli/src/commands/sync.ts:35","fix_direction":"Add an explicit pre-dispatch guard: if args.continue && args.abort, print an actionable usage error and set a nonzero exit before calling either resume path. Cover the command-level flag combination in tests, not only the lower-level state-machine helpers.","affected_components":["fabric sync","sync command parser","conflict resume flow"],"tags":["cli-arg-contracts","mutually-exclusive-flags","sync","flag-contradiction"]}]

title: Schema Serializer Roundtrip Sweep
description: Scan schema validation vs serializers/parsers for YAML/TOML/JSONL/config/frontmatter/events/metrics/path normalization. Look for inputs accepted by schema but broken by writer/parser, or docs claiming round-trip that fails.
findings: 已读 registry 并去重 ISS-20260609-021..042 及旧 frontmatter/YAML/JSONL issue；用 rg/rg --files 扫过 packages/scripts/docs 的 schema、extract/review/meta-builder、TOML/JSON config、events/metrics JSONL。新增 1 个 distinct：frontmatter serializer 已会 quote，但 parser 仍按逗号硬拆且只剥引号，schema-valid 字符串无法 round-trip。
issues_found: [{"title":"Quoted frontmatter arrays do not round-trip through line-based parsers","severity":"medium","description":"FabReview/FabExtract schemas accept arbitrary strings for tags and relevance_paths, and review also accepts title/summary. Writers now quote complex values with JSON/YAML escaping, but readers still use line-based helpers that split flow arrays on every comma and only strip surrounding quotes. A schema-valid value such as a tag or path containing a comma is serialized as a quoted array element, then parsed back as two corrupted elements; escaped newlines/backslashes in quoted title/summary similarly come back as literal escape text rather than the original string. This breaks list/search filters, path relevance, and metadata round-trip while being distinct from the older unescaped-injection findings.","location":"packages/shared/src/schemas/api-contracts.ts:891; packages/shared/src/schemas/api-contracts.ts:898; packages/server/src/services/review.ts:1395; packages/server/src/services/review.ts:1520; packages/server/src/services/knowledge-meta-builder.ts:1288; packages/server/src/services/knowledge-meta-builder.ts:1294","fix_direction":"Replace parseFlowArray/extractInlineArray and stripQuotes/unquote with a real YAML frontmatter parser or a tokenizer that respects quoted scalars and JSON/YAML escapes; add round-trip tests for commas, quotes, backslashes, and escaped newlines. Alternatively constrain schema values to the subset the current parser can actually round-trip.","affected_components":["fab_review modify/list/search","fab_extract_knowledge frontmatter metadata","knowledge-meta-builder","frontmatter tags/relevance_paths/title/summary"],"tags":["schema-serializer-roundtrip","frontmatter","yaml","parser-drift","metadata-roundtrip"]}]

title: Audit History Lifecycle Sweep
description: Scan event ledger, issue registry, review history, doctor health, sync/import/archive audit trails and lifecycle state transitions. Find missing or misleading state transitions not already registered.
findings: 扫过 registry 021..042 及 audit/lifecycle 旧项，并检查 review、event-ledger、archive-scan、doctor/issue 相关状态转换。新增 2 个 distinct 问题：defer ledger 事件缺目标身份，search 的 include_rejected 契约与 rejected/ 目录实现不一致。
issues_found: [{"title":"knowledge_deferred ledger events do not identify the deferred entry","severity":"medium","description":"fab_review.defer mutates each pending file, but the emitted knowledge_deferred event only contains timestamp plus optional until/reason. The schema has only optional stable_id and no pending_path, and the service never sets stable_id. When defer is called on one or more unassigned pending entries, the audit ledger cannot reconstruct which entry was deferred; with omitted reason/until the events are indistinguishable.","location":"packages/server/src/services/review.ts:1279; packages/shared/src/schemas/event-ledger.ts:368","fix_direction":"Add an explicit pending_path or knowledge_ref field to knowledge_deferred events, populate it for every deferred path, and include stable_id when frontmatter has one. Add regression coverage for multi-path defer and omitted until/reason.","affected_components":["fab_review defer","event ledger","review lifecycle audit"],"tags":["audit-history-lifecycle","ledger","review","state-transition"]},{"title":"fab_review search cannot surface rejected entries despite include_rejected contract","severity":"medium","description":"The shared contract says rejected entries are excluded from list/search unless filters.include_rejected=true, and listPending adds the sibling rejected/ directory when that flag is set. searchEntries, however, builds sources only from pending and canonical roots, so rejected entries moved out of pending/ by reject are invisible to search even for audit tooling that opts into include_rejected.","location":"packages/server/src/services/review.ts:1111; packages/shared/src/schemas/api-contracts.ts:1045","fix_direction":"Make searchEntries include the rejected sibling roots when include_rejected is true, and decide whether the output area enum needs a rejected value or a documented pending-with-status representation. Add tests covering reject -> search(include_rejected:true).","affected_components":["fab_review search","fab_review reject","review audit view","API contract"],"tags":["audit-history-lifecycle","schema-runtime-drift","review","rejected-state"]}]

title: Cross Client Generated Parity Sweep
description: Scan generated hooks/skills/templates across Claude/Codex/Cursor, install pipeline, parity matrix, managed blocks, snapshots. Find drift where install/generated output or tests disagree with canonical source.
findings: 已读 registry 并核对 021..042 及 parity/生成物旧项；扫了 packages/cli templates/install pipeline、packages/shared parity-matrix、active .claude/.codex hooks/skills、相关测试。新增 1 个 distinct issue：parity matrix/E2E 枚举漏掉已安装的 audit/connect skills 与 cite/session-end/post-tooluse hooks，导致矩阵门禁可在生成产物漂移时仍通过。
issues_found: [{"title":"Parity matrix E2E omits installed hooks and skills from the generated-output sweep","severity":"medium","description":"The install source of truth now writes fabric-audit and fabric-connect skills plus cite-policy, SessionEnd, and PostToolUse hook scripts/config commands across clients, but the parity matrix only lists three hook capabilities and skills through fabric-store, and the matrix-driven E2E maps only those same subsets. A drift in those installed generated outputs can therefore pass the advertised five-client parity gate because the canonical matrix never enumerates them.","location":"packages/cli/src/install/skills-and-hooks.ts:158; packages/cli/src/install/skills-and-hooks.ts:226; packages/shared/src/parity/parity-matrix.json:6; packages/shared/src/parity/parity-matrix.json:300; packages/cli/__tests__/integration/parity-matrix-e2e.test.ts:31; packages/cli/__tests__/integration/parity-matrix-e2e.test.ts:45","fix_direction":"Add parity-matrix capability rows for fabric-audit, fabric-connect, cite-policy-evict, session-end-marker, and post-tooluse-mutation, or explicitly mark them internal/non-matrix with a tested exclusion. Extend HOOK_SCRIPT/SKILL_SLUG and assertions so the E2E gate derives from the full install destination tables instead of a hand-maintained subset.","affected_components":["packages/shared/src/parity/parity-matrix.json","packages/cli/__tests__/integration/parity-matrix-e2e.test.ts","packages/cli/src/install/skills-and-hooks.ts","cross-client install parity gate"],"tags":["cross-client-generated-parity","parity-matrix","generated-output-drift","test-gate-drift"]}]

title: Workspace Package Boundary Sweep
description: Scan package exports, workspace membership, tsconfig/build/test scripts, quarantined/no-op packages, CI assumptions, and package metadata. Find boundary issues not already captured.
findings: 已去重 ISS-20260609-021..042 及 workspace/package 旧 issue；扫描 pnpm-workspace、root/package manifests、package exports/imports、tsconfig、release/CI 与版本脚本。新增 1 个低危 CI/package 边界问题：Windows smoke 声称覆盖 shebang 与 --help，但实际只用 node 直跑 --version，绕过 package bin/shebang 和 help 渲染。
issues_found: [{"title":"Windows smoke bypasses the published CLI bin and promised --help coverage","severity":"low","description":"The Windows smoke job says it catches POSIX-only path/shebang assumptions and covers CLI --help/--version, but the only CLI command executed is `node packages/cli/dist/index.js --version`. That bypasses the package `bin` entry and shebang path that npm/pnpm users actually invoke, and it never exercises help rendering on Windows, so package-bin or Windows-only help regressions can ship while the smoke still passes.","location":".github/workflows/ci.yml:68; .github/workflows/ci.yml:102; packages/cli/package.json:29","fix_direction":"Run the installed package binary path on Windows, for example `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli exec fabric --version` plus `fabric --help`, or after build invoke the generated npm bin shim. Keep the comment and smoke command aligned so package metadata/bin and help rendering are actually covered.","affected_components":[".github/workflows/ci.yml","packages/cli/package.json","@fenglimg/fabric-cli Windows package smoke"],"tags":["workspace-package-boundaries","ci-assumption-drift","package-bin","windows-smoke"]}]
